_meta.description: Empty-list response for GET /api/vehicles. Returned when the authenticated caller has no linked vehicles. Per rest-api.md §7.0 the list never returns 403/404 for the list itself — an authenticated user always sees at minimum an empty items: [] array. This is also the v1 response for viewer-tier callers, because viewer-merged enumeration is PLANNED (the Go server does not yet read the Prisma-owned Invite table).
